items.title: Fiorentina draws with Atalanta in dreary end to season for both
items.summary: It was also a disappointing season from Atalanta, whose top-four finishes in the last two seasons guaranteed it Champions League football
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Jubilant Hull City promoted to the Premier League
items.summary: Hull City have been promoted to the Premier League after a 1-0 win in the Championship playoff final against Middlesbrough on Saturday at Wembley Stadium.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Matt Taylor the mastermind as Gloucestershire sneak past Glamorgan
items.summary: Gutsy tail-end effort makes the difference in close-fought local rivalry
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
